# ClutterPro

> Speech rate training platform for people with cluttering
> (tachylalia / fluency disorders). Real-time visual biofeedback
> in syllables per second (SPS) based on Van Zaalen clinical norms.
> Built by a person who clutters, validated by SLPs.
> Published by ClutterPro Inc.

## What is ClutterPro?

ClutterPro is a web-based speech training app designed for people who speak too fast (cluttering / tachylalia). It provides real-time visual biofeedback measuring articulatory rate in syllables per second (SPS), based on Van Zaalen (2009) clinical thresholds. The tool is used by speech-language pathologists (SLPs) in the US for between-session patient monitoring.

### Key Features

- **Real-time speech biofeedback**: automatic articulatory rate measurement (syllables/second) during reading or spontaneous speech.
- **Free voice test**: speech rate assessment in 30 seconds, no sign-up required, with instant clinical result.
- **Self-assessment (Predictive Cluttering Inventory)**: 10-question cluttering screening questionnaire.
- **Library of 95+ exercises**: progressively graded texts for articulatory training.
- **Rebus Mode**: visual exercises for pre-readers (ages 4–6).
- **SLP dashboard**: multi-patient monitoring, clinical metrics, progress reports, exercise assignment.
- **Gamification**: day streaks, daily goals, badges to sustain patient motivation.

### Clinical Norms Used

- Normal articulatory rate: 3.5 to 4.5 syllables/second (adult English speaker)
- Cluttering threshold: > 5.0 syllables/second (Van Zaalen, 2009)
- Therapeutic targets: 3.0 SPS (slow), 4.0 SPS (moderate), 5.0 SPS (fast)

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.clutterpro.com/) : Platform overview and vocal biofeedback method.
- [Free Voice Test](https://www.clutterpro.com/diagnostic) : Measure your speech rate in 30 seconds, no sign-up. Instant clinical result.
- [Self-Assessment](https://www.clutterpro.com/assessment) : Cluttering screening test (Predictive Cluttering Inventory) — 10 questions.
- [For SLPs](https://www.clutterpro.com/pro) : Professional features for patient monitoring (metrics, reports, assigned exercises).
- [Pricing](https://www.clutterpro.com/pricing) : Plans and subscriptions (free for patients, subscription for SLPs).
- [About](https://www.clutterpro.com/about) : Founder story and project mission.

## Blog — Expert Articles

- [What Is Cluttering? A Complete Guide](https://www.clutterpro.com/blog/what-is-cluttering) : Symptoms, neurological causes, and difference from stuttering.
- [Best Tools for Cluttering Assessment in 2026](https://www.clutterpro.com/blog/best-cluttering-assessment-tools-2026) : Comparison of tools used by SLPs for measuring articulatory rate.
- [10 Proven Speech Rate Exercises for Cluttering](https://www.clutterpro.com/blog/speech-rate-exercises-cluttering) : Mechanical re-education techniques: syllabic reading, chunking, biofeedback.
- [Cluttering in Children: Signs, Causes and Therapy](https://www.clutterpro.com/blog/cluttering-in-children) : How to identify cluttering early and support young patients.
- [Cluttering vs. Stuttering: Key Differences](https://www.clutterpro.com/blog/cluttering-vs-stuttering) : Clinical distinctions and co-occurrence patterns.
